subcodes.first_line: The Leaf, daughter of that honored Lady, hath turned toward the Most Great Goal and the Supreme Horizon. Praise be to God, divine favors have assisted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ورقه بنت آن مخدره قصد مقصد اقصی و افق اعلی نمود لله الحمد عنایت الهی اعانت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas
